reviews.review_title: Heres an idea for a map/event
reviews.review_description:
Alright so i want you to make a circus map with all the typical things you would see in a circus and there would also be some kind of clown-like monster OR you could make it an event called "Coulrophobia" (which is fear of clowns) and if you go a lil bit TOO close to this clown looking monster it would let out an atrocious laugh and start chasing you whilst laughing
So Fractional if you see someone called "Fleshborne" that is me and i really hope this gets added in the game
before making a review on how the game is broken i want you to know that there's a new applab named "purgatory horror" so play that instead

reviews.review_title: amazing game, just needs more maps.
reviews.review_description: you guys have made an amazing game, it’s really fun but when you die and have to rejoin the loading screen should be a little faster and you guys should make a volcano map, or even a huge map with a huge monster which would be really fun and scary to get chased by, but anyway this game is really fun and I hope it gets more attention.

reviews.review_title: The BEST GTH game I have EVER PLAYED
reviews.review_description:
Bro I’ve been playing GTH games and have been in the community for over 2 years yet I could never find a game that would actually scare me.

Most of the games like Clouds Gorilla Horror/Gorilla Tag Horror Cloud Edition would be kind of scary and then I get used to the games quickly.

But this one actually traumatized me so hard
I actually wish I would’ve recorded my first reaction because I actually SCREAMED at the TOP OF MY LUNGS 💔🙏😭

I honestly can’t even wait til the other maps come out and when more intense entities get added and play it with most friends.

I put 3 Stars because it's between 1 and 5 stars. It's Very Fun but the modders there bad i mean evil because i joined the code 1 and a modder lags the the game. But why?. the game might be removed from applab or the meta store in the very near future the devloper of the game need to read this .

reviews.review_title: Good Game but the mods/events ruined it
reviews.review_description: The new update made it way more laggier and annoying events less like events and more like daily inconveniences. And when someone is less than 10 feet away you can’t hear them at all which wasn’t even a problem before. Why fix something that isn’t broken??? and the modders just kinda ruin the game for regular players.

This game is super fun to play with friends and has a good amount of players online. It has a lot of monsters for only hills and mines. It is very good but i have some complaints. The modders ruin the game a lot and makes it less fun, so whenever they join you have to swap servers since they just mess up the game. if you get caught you get kicked which is annoying. Also there are only 2 maps which is kind of boring. But overall it isnt bad at all.
